description.value: This spell draws upon the latent planar energy of the casterâs surroundings, allowing her to temporarily infuse a creature with the planeâs power. The touched creature gains that planeâs basic infusion for the spellâs duration. This spell has no effect if cast on the Material Plane, and it ends as soon as the spellâs target leaves the plane with which it has been infused. Details on planar infusions can be found in each planeâs Infusion section. Once a creature gains the benefits of bestow planar infusion I, it remains attuned to that plane for 24 hours. Additional castings of bestow planar infusion I during this time bestow the same infusion that was granted by the initial casting that day. Planar infusions that can be used a limited number of times per day are not refreshed by multiple castings of bestow planar infusion I. Bestow Planar Infusion II This functions as bestow planar infusion I, except that the touched creature gains the improved infusion of the current plane. Bestow Planar Infusion III This functions as bestow planar infusion I, except that the touched creature gains the greater infusion of the current plane.
